title: 早發白帝城
author: 李白
summary: 清晨離開白帝城，乘舟穿越三峽，表現輕快自由的心情。
background: 這首詩寫李白離開白帝城順流東下的旅程。色彩、聲音、速度與空間高度集中，讓讀者感受到船行千里的暢快。
authorBio: 李白的山水行旅詩常把真實景物與豪邁心情融合，形成飛動明亮的節奏。

lines.pinyin: zhāo cí bái dì cǎi yún jiān
lines.translation: 清晨告別彩雲繚繞的白帝城。
lines.explain: 「彩雲間」寫出白帝城地勢高峻，也帶出明麗色彩。
lines.english: At dawn I leave White Emperor City amid colored clouds.
lines.imagePrompt: CalcBox Ink Style, cinematic Chinese ink wash painting, refined blue-green landscape palette, elegant negative space, delicate mineral pigments, subtle paper texture, atmospheric depth, historically inspired Tang dynasty clothing and architecture, restrained facial detail, 16:9, no text, no watermark. Scene inspired by the poem line: 朝辭白帝彩雲間. 清晨告別彩雲繚繞的白帝城。 Setting: 三峽江行, 不限定 season, 清晨, mood: 輕快 and 自由.
lines.voicePrompt: Professional Mandarin Chinese narration, Taiwan accent, calm literary delivery, clear diction, moderate-slow pace. Read exactly: 朝辭白帝彩雲間

lines.pinyin: qiān lǐ jiāng líng yí rì huán
lines.translation: 千里之外的江陵，一天之內便能到達。
lines.explain: 以距離與時間對比，突出順流而下的快速。
lines.english: A thousand miles to Jiangling, reached within a day.
lines.imagePrompt: CalcBox Ink Style, cinematic Chinese ink wash painting, refined blue-green landscape palette, elegant negative space, delicate mineral pigments, subtle paper texture, atmospheric depth, historically inspired Tang dynasty clothing and architecture, restrained facial detail, 16:9, no text, no watermark. Scene inspired by the poem line: 千里江陵一日還. 千里之外的江陵，一天之內便能到達。 Setting: 三峽江行, 不限定 season, 清晨, mood: 輕快 and 自由.
lines.voicePrompt: Professional Mandarin Chinese narration, Taiwan accent, calm literary delivery, clear diction, moderate-slow pace. Read exactly: 千里江陵一日還

lines.pinyin: liǎng àn yuán shēng tí bú zhù
lines.translation: 兩岸猿猴的叫聲接連不斷。
lines.explain: 用連續聲音表現船行途中景物迅速掠過。
lines.english: Apes cry endlessly from both riverbanks.
lines.imagePrompt: CalcBox Ink Style, cinematic Chinese ink wash painting, refined blue-green landscape palette, elegant negative space, delicate mineral pigments, subtle paper texture, atmospheric depth, historically inspired Tang dynasty clothing and architecture, restrained facial detail, 16:9, no text, no watermark. Scene inspired by the poem line: 兩岸猿聲啼不住. 兩岸猿猴的叫聲接連不斷。 Setting: 三峽江行, 不限定 season, 清晨, mood: 輕快 and 自由.
lines.voicePrompt: Professional Mandarin Chinese narration, Taiwan accent, calm literary delivery, clear diction, moderate-slow pace. Read exactly: 兩岸猿聲啼不住

lines.pinyin: qīng zhōu yǐ guò wàn chóng shān
lines.translation: 輕快的小船早已穿過重重山嶺。
lines.explain: 「輕舟」既寫船快，也象徵詩人心情的解放。
lines.english: The light boat has passed ten thousand mountains.

storyMode.narration: 清晨告別彩雲繚繞的白帝城。 「彩雲間」寫出白帝城地勢高峻，也帶出明麗色彩。
千里之外的江陵，一天之內便能到達。 以距離與時間對比，突出順流而下的快速。
兩岸猿猴的叫聲接連不斷。 用連續聲音表現船行途中景物迅速掠過。
輕快的小船早已穿過重重山嶺。 「輕舟」既寫船快，也象徵詩人心情的解放。

faq.a: 《早發白帝城》的作者是唐代詩人李白。
全詩主要表達「輕快、自由」的情感與意境。

faq.q: 《早發白帝城》適合哪個年級學習？
faq.a: 本頁建議難度為 2 級，適合國小程度閱讀。
